name: @abdulmuiz44/clientpad-whatsapp
description: WhatsApp webhook handler and AI assistant utilities for ClientPad.
WhatsApp commerce helpers for ClientPad flows, Nigerian payment links, and payment webhooks.
Fetch-compatible WhatsApp Cloud API helpers for ClientPad service businesses.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @abdulmuiz44/clientpad-core build && pnpm --filter @abdulmuiz44/clientpad-sdk build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @abdulmuiz44/clientpad-core build && pnpm --filter @abdulmuiz44/clientpad-sdk build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
